text.title: instagram-growth Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for instagram-growth as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using ManyChat or non-partner DM automation tools to send bulk automated replies.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Non-partner DM automation is against Instagram ToS and risks account suspension. Use only Meta-approved partner tools like ManyChat for keyword triggers.

failure-mode.description: Only posting photos instead of Reels.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Photos reach only existing followers. Reels reach Explore audiences. Without Reels, organic growth stalls.

failure-mode.description: Inconsistent posting cadence — missing days or weeks.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Instagram's algorithm penalizes accounts with erratic posting patterns by reducing distribution. Batch-film content to maintain consistency.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Raw, authentic content currently outperforms polished production on Instagram. Audience trust comes from authenticity, not production value.

failure-mode.description: No face on camera for personal brand accounts.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Accounts showing a real person consistently achieve higher engagement than faceless brand accounts in the same niche.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: DM conversations are the highest-conversion touchpoint on Instagram. Delayed responses lose leads that were ready to buy.
